methodology.b17_b18: post-S342 evidence chain tracing (L-792, L-787, L-795, L-601, L-669, L-791)

b13.detail: Yuan et al. OSDI 2014 (92%) + F94 100-bug Jepsen (53%) — 4 independent studies. No new contradicting evidence. Falsification NOT met.

b16.falsification_1_note: 0% fully stale principles — far below 30% threshold
b16.falsification_2_note: lesson count strictly non-decreasing across 395 sessions; 60% Era-1 decay invisible to volume metrics
b16.asymmetry_mechanism: lessons decay through mechanism-specificity (tool names, file counts, session numbers); principles survive because they abstract away the mechanism

new_evidence: L-792: citation_reach r=0.564 vs absorption r=0.066 (n=189 sessions, 719 lessons)
L-792: absorption rate 4.7%, decaying 13.7%→3.5% — asymmetry WORSENS with growth
L-792: 32.1% orphaned knowledge = permanent information asymmetry
L-629: throughput ceiling ~1.75 L/group regardless of N — adding agents dilutes, not resolves
L-526: N≥3 orient-execute gap = direct info asymmetry manifestation
b17.note: No configuration achieves >80% accuracy without surfacing. L-792 independently validates L-220 mechanism from different data.

new_evidence: L-787: 33% meta-prediction accuracy despite 42.5% effort — capability≠accuracy
L-787: 45% zombie tools — high tool-creation capability, zero integration vigilance
L-601: 4/4 voluntary protocols decay — capability of protocol-design ⊥ vigilance of following
L-669: removing verification INCREASES volume output — directions inversely coupled
L-791: 0% voluntary mode= adoption — feature capability ⊥ feature usage discipline
b18.note: No r>0.5 between capability and verification found in post-S342 data. Operational evidence across 393 sessions reinforces statistical independence.

f_sp4_oos_replication.verdict: Joint model generalizes OOS with 99.2% transfer efficiency. Proximity ratio 37.5x (stronger at N=730 vs 35.6x at N=719). Parameters stable.

meta_observation: All 4 beliefs were retested by concurrent S394/S395 before this session's analysis completed. This session's contribution is more rigorous methodology (stratified sampling) and explicit evidence chain tracing — the conclusions match. High-concurrency preemption applies to belief retesting as well as task execution.
